title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, discusses how her company competes with much larger incumbents by building a full enterprise platform for performance management that integrates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data. She argues that building the hard path of a complete platform from day one, rather than shipping single features, creates a sustainable competitive advantage, and emphasizes that hiring discipline and securing endorsements from respected companies are critical to enterprise growth.
writeup: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, explains how the company competes against far larger incumbents in performance management by building a full enterprise platform that integrates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data. She argues that taking the hard path of a complete platform from day one, rather than shipping single features, builds a sustainable competitive advantage. The video also covers her view that hiring discipline and endorsements from respected companies are critical to enterprise growth.
